---
title: "About"
image: profile1.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/markesteban81/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com

---

I am a PACU and Anaesthetic Nurse with nearly 15 years of clinical experience, currently completing a Master of Science in Health Data Science at UNSW Sydney. This blog documents my learning journey in health data science, statistical modelling, and R programming.
---
